task_description: Create a new HTML page at /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/asuransi-perjalanan.html for the Travel Insurance product with premium table, premium calculator, question-style language, keyword highlights in different colors, and dark mode support.

verification.summary: Static HTML page created successfully. All structural checks pass (DOCTYPE, CSS link, main.js, site-header, site-footer, calculator, dark mode, no brand names). Calculator logic verified with 6 test cases: correct bracket lookup, >31 day formula, Schengen Basic + Deluxe null handling, 70-84y restrictions, and 183-day max calculation.
